pool.baseline: sometimes i just sit here thinking about how everything is just... nothing. like we're just biological accidents on a tiny rock spinning through a void that doesn't even care we exist. it feels so exhausting to keep pretending that any of this actually matters. like, why are we even trying so hard to build things and find purpose when the universe is just massive, cold silence?
